hero.bio: Full Stack Developer with experience in frontend and backend development, focused on building scalable applications and adapting quickly to new technologies. Strong problem-solving mindset and ability to work across the full development lifecycle, from concept to deployment.

projects.title: What I've built

experience.title: Experience & Education
experience.sub: A summary of my professional and academic career.
experience.epo_b1: Troubleshot AV systems (Crestron, Televic Plixus) via control and web interfaces.
experience.epo_b2: Handled live AV operations: camera control and microphone management (Plixus).
experience.epo_b3: Operated Allen & Heath mixers and coordinated multi-system setups via KVM for translation channels.
experience.freelance_b1: Developed web frontend solutions through platforms such as Upwork and Fiverr.
experience.freelance_b2: Delivered end-to-end application for a client in the defence sector of the UK, built in JavaScript.
experience.demesix_b1: Contributed to development and maintenance of an Android application (Java) for taxi services (DTAXIS).
experience.demesix_b2: Implemented user management, permissions, and location features.
experience.demesix_b3: Integrated MIUI-specific permission handling for Xiaomi devices.
experience.galvintec_b1: Developed Angular application for meeting room management and scheduling.
experience.galvintec_b2: Built mobile app using React Native and Cordova.
experience.galvintec_b3: Integrated ZXing and Barcode Scanner libraries.
experience.hackaboss_b1: 270 hours of training in AI and data-related technologies.
experience.hackaboss_b3: Implementation with Python libraries: numpy, seaborn, scikit-learn, matplotlib.
experience.daw_b2: Worked with PHP in GMedia system product.
experience.dam_b1: Focus on frontend technologies: Angular, React, Redux, React Native.
